topics.hook: You get $3,167 back from the IRS and spend 90% of it in a month — your brain's doing that on purpose.

topics.title: Grocery Stores Are Engineered to Steal $47 From You

topics.title: The Anchor Price Trick That Makes You Overpay
topics.hook: Stores put a $400 item next to a $160 one so $160 feels like a steal — your brain falls for it every single time.

topics.hook: You bought new sneakers and suddenly everything you own looks wrong — that cascading urge has a name, and a $3,000 price tag.

topics.title: Why 70% of Lottery Winners Go Broke in 5 Years

topics.title: The Scarcity Mindset Tax That Costs You $1,800/Year
topics.hook: Worrying about money actually makes you worse at managing it — and scientists have measured exactly how much it costs you.

topics.title: The Sunk Cost Trap Secretly Costing You $4,700
topics.hook: You keep paying for things you never use because you already spent money on them — and that mental glitch is draining thousands a year.

topics.title: The Joneses Effect Is Stealing $6,200 From You
topics.hook: Your neighbor's new car just triggered a spending cascade in your brain — and it costs the average American over six thousand dollars a year.

topics.title: Your 'Free' Rewards Card Is Costing You $2,400
